name: Cursor CLI
description: Installs the Cursor CLI (agent) into the dev container.

updateOnPostStart.description: Re-run the Cursor installer during the dev container postStart phase to update to the latest version.

seedConfig.description: Seed ~/.cursor/cli-config.json from a host mount (~/.cred-seed/cursor/cli-config.json) or the image-baked default on first start only.

seedCredentials.description: Seed ~/.cursor/auth.json from a host mount (~/.cred-seed/cursor/auth.json) on first start only. No-op when the seed file is absent.

postStartCommand: d=/usr/local/share/devcontainer-feature-ai-assistant/cursor; for s in update.sh seed-config.sh seed-credentials.sh; do f="$d/$s"; if [ -x "$f" ]; then "$f"; fi; done
